entries.title: Commentary on Genesis (Hexaemeron) on genesis 11:18
entries.excerpt: But Heber lived thirty-four years and begot Phaleg. The seventy interpreters have it one hundred and thirty-four.

entries.title: Commentary on Genesis (Hexaemeron) on genesis 11:18
entries.excerpt: Indeed, Phaleg lived thirty years and begot Reu. The seventy interpreters have it one hundred and thirty.
